subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Verily, Thou art the Sovereign of the heavens and of the earth and of whatsoever lieth between them. Thou bestowest sovereignty upon whomsoever Thou willest, and from whomsoever Thou willest Thou takest it away. Thou exaltest whomsoever Thou willest, and Thou abasest whomsoever Thou willest, and Thou forgivest whom Thou willest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم انک انت ملاک السموات و الارض و ما بینهما لتؤتین الملک من تشاء و لتنزعن عمن تشاء و لتعزن من تشاء و لتذلن من تشاء من یشاء و لتتفرن من یشاء
